summary: The project rules existed, but the production loop did not enforce them. Phase 02 failed visual validation, Phase 03 was created anyway, and the Phase 03 report contains hard-coded similarity scores rather than independent review evidence.

invalidated_outputs.reason: Similarity scores are hard-coded in the generator script and are not independent visual-review evidence.
Useful historical prototype, but not an approved visual baseline for further production.

ignored_gates.finding: visual_pass was false and approved_for_phase_3_geometry was false, but Phase 03 proceeded.

root_causes.finding: The failed Phase 02 visual review did not stop Phase 03.
Builder and Roblox design reports allowed Phase 03 despite visual validation failure.
Phase 03 similarity scores are static values written by the builder script.
Reference images were inserted into the Blender scene as panels, but no model-quality review or geometry constraint was derived from them.
Core structures still rely on torus, UV sphere, cylinder, ellipsoid, and latitude/meridian grid construction that reads as geometric.
The builder report contained pass/fail assertions and specialist pass summaries, so review was not independent enough to catch the visual drift.

answers_to_user_questions.why_principles_were_not_respected: The principles were documented but not enforced by a hard validator or a blocking independent visual review. The scripts continued to use primitive-like forms and the pipeline accepted files/reports existing as progress.
answers_to_user_questions.why_review_did_not_happen: A review artifact existed, but the blocking visual failure was ignored. Phase 03 did not receive an independent visual approval; its own report wrote claimed similarity scores from the generator script.
answers_to_user_questions.why_iteration_stopped_before_matching_ba: The iteration loop focused on camera framing and comparison-board layout, not on changing the model until it visually matched the baseline. There was no required live Blender checkpoint or stop condition requiring baseline similarity.

required_corrections: Freeze current Phase 02 and Phase 03 nucleus outputs as failed prototypes.
Treat phase_03_visual_iteration_report.json as invalid approval evidence.
Restart with Phase 02R focused only on double envelope and perinuclear lumen.
Require Blender visual inspection with reference image and model visible in the same scene before any approval.
Require independent visual review before the next phase.
Add a phase-advance validator that blocks on failed visual reports, missing reviewer provenance, or hard-coded similarity scores.
